BTC-USD.reasoning: BTC has a powerful convergence of near-term catalysts: FOMC April 28-29 (rate-hold likely positive for risk assets), the CLARITY Act Senate markup advancing regulatory certainty, and a Strategic Reserve announcement expected ~2 months out generating anticipatory buying. Technically, daily EMAs are fully aligned in uptrend (10>21>50), RSI at 62 is elevated but not overbought, MACD histogram expanding positive, and Bollinger position at 0.80 with price near the upper band signaling momentum. The hourly picture shows an extremely overbought RSI (92) and stochastic (93.5k/96.7d) — a short-term pullback is likely before a continuation. The ADX at 31.6 confirms a trending market. Current price ~$78,989 is above the daily resistance of $77,127, but the hourly resistance caps at ~$79,081. Entry on a modest intraday pullback toward $77,000-78,000 offers better risk/reward into the FOMC catalyst window. Stop below pre-catalyst support at $75,500. Target at daily resistance cluster ~$84,000-85,000 (prior swing high zone) representing ~8-9% upside.
BTC-USD.catalyst: FOMC April 28-29 rate decision + CLARITY Act Senate markup advancing crypto regulatory framework
